title: 30o: hex_digit uppercase/lowercase split
description: crates/jmap-chat/src/blob.rs: hex_digit() produces uppercase A-F (correct for percent_encode/RFC 3986), but compute_sha256_hex() calls it then appends .to_lowercase() to satisfy the lowercase-hex validator at line 179. The shared helper serving two callers with opposite case requirements and patching the result after the fact is a design smell. Fix: introduce a lowercase hex helper for the SHA-256 path (or produce lowercase in hex_digit and add a separate uppercase path for percent_encode).
close_reason: fixed as part of 30o.17: hex_digit parameter clarifies uppercase/lowercase purpose
